title: Crunchy Mozza Pizza
description: A delicious and easy pizza recipe with a crunchy topping. Perfect for a quick dinner or snack.
instructions: Roll out the pre-made pizza crust.
Spread the fermented mozzarella cheese evenly over the crust.
Add the crunchy topping of your choice.
Bake the pizza in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
Remove the pizza from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
